meta.name: Mullusi
meta.purpose: Structured public website content for Mullusi.

platformLayers.name: Public Surface
platformLayers.boundary: identity, trust, roadmap, product discovery, documentation entry, and proof boundary

am.name: Public Surface
am.boundary: identity, trust, roadmap, product discovery, documentation entry, and proof boundary

platformLayers.name: User Surface
platformLayers.boundary: dashboard workspaces, sandbox demos, product apps, and private operator views

am.name: User Surface
am.boundary: dashboard workspaces, sandbox demos, product apps, and private operator views

platformLayers.name: API Surface
platformLayers.boundary: versioned endpoints, job access, artifact access, and governed service contracts

am.name: API Surface
am.boundary: versioned endpoints, job access, artifact access, and governed service contracts

platformLayers.name: Control Plane
platformLayers.boundary: auth, organizations, roles, entitlements, policy, audit, service registry, and job registry
platformLayers.governs: Who is allowed and what policy applies?

am.name: Control Plane
am.boundary: auth, organizations, roles, entitlements, policy, audit, service registry, and job registry
am.governs: Who is allowed and what policy applies?

platformLayers.name: Product Services
platformLayers.boundary: search, agents, chain, video, music, science, robotics, and developer services

am.name: Product Services
am.boundary: search, agents, chain, video, music, science, robotics, and developer services

platformLayers.name: Data Layer
platformLayers.boundary: structured records, object artifacts, indexes, audit events, logs, and backups
platformLayers.governs: What state, artifact, or trace is preserved?

am.name: Data Layer
am.boundary: structured records, object artifacts, indexes, audit events, logs, and backups
am.governs: What state, artifact, or trace is preserved?

platformLayers.name: Runtime Infrastructure
platformLayers.boundary: DNS, HTTPS, security, CDN, workers, queues, compute nodes, and monitoring
platformLayers.governs: Where do traffic, compute, and recovery live?

am.name: Runtime Infrastructure
am.boundary: DNS, HTTPS, security, CDN, workers, queues, compute nodes, and monitoring
am.governs: Where do traffic, compute, and recovery live?

platformLayers.name: Development Layer
platformLayers.boundary: private source, selected public releases, CI/CD, tests, release gates, and documentation
platformLayers.governs: Where source, tests, and release evidence originate?

am.name: Development Layer
am.boundary: private source, selected public releases, CI/CD, tests, release gates, and documentation
am.governs: Where source, tests, and release evidence originate?

requestFlow.label: Request Flow
requestFlow.title: A product request always crosses the control plane.
requestFlow.summary: Human and machine requests enter through public surfaces, pass governance, create a job, run a private product service, store outputs, record a trace, and return only safe results.

am.label: Request Flow
am.title: A product request always crosses the control plane.
am.summary: Human and machine requests enter through public surfaces, pass governance, create a job, run a private product service, store outputs, record a trace, and return only safe results.

platformBuildSequence.label: Foundation Sequence
platformBuildSequence.title: Build the spine before broad product services.
platformBuildSequence.summary: The platform becomes stable when the public map, docs, source boundary, edge gate, control-plane skeleton, API health, identity layer, and first governed product arrive in order.

steps.name: Public website
steps.reason: identity, product discovery, roadmap, and proof boundary

steps.name: Docs route
steps.reason: architecture, API contracts, governance rules, and developer guides

steps.name: Private source boundary
steps.reason: repos, issues, CI/CD, version history, and release tags

steps.name: Cloudflare edge
steps.reason: DNS, HTTPS, routing, security, CDN, and traffic protection

steps.name: Control-plane skeleton
steps.reason: product registry, permissions, policy checks, job registry, and audit logs

steps.name: API health endpoint
steps.reason: GET /health, service readiness, and deployment witness

steps.name: User/auth layer
steps.reason: users, organizations, roles, entitlements, and usage limits

steps.name: First governed product
steps.reason: Mullu route connected to registry, policy, evidence, and docs

am.label: Foundation Sequence
am.title: Build the spine before broad product services.
am.summary: The platform becomes stable when the public map, docs, source boundary, edge gate, control-plane skeleton, API health, identity layer, and first governed product arrive in order.

proofLanes.label: Identity
proofLanes.title: Immutable public boundary
proofLanes.summary: Mullusi is presented as one governed system across website, docs, release evidence, sandbox, metrics, and public contact paths.

am.label: ማንነት
am.title: የማይለወጥ ይፋዊ ወሰን
am.summary: ሙሉሲ በድረ-ገጽ፣ በሰነዶች፣ በሪፖዚቶሪዎች፣ በsandbox፣ በmetrics እና በይፋዊ የመገናኛ መንገዶች ላይ እንደ አንድ የሚተዳደር ሥርዓት ይቀርባል።

proofLanes.label: Governance
proofLanes.title: Claims tied to evidence
proofLanes.summary: Public claims are separated into the deployed website, private incubation, planned domains, and operational interfaces.

am.label: አስተዳደር
am.title: የይገባኛል ጥያቄዎች ከማስረጃ ጋር የተሳሰሩ
am.summary: ይፋዊ የይገባኛል ጥያቄዎች ወደ ተሰማራው ድረ-ገጽ፣ የግል ማብሰያ፣ ታቅደው ያሉ ጎራዎችና የአሠራር በይነገጾች ይከፋፈላሉ።

proofLanes.label: Structure
proofLanes.title: Content is data-backed
proofLanes.summary: Deployment card, staged domain engines, interface links, proof lanes, and roadmap stages are modeled as structured records.

am.label: መዋቅር
am.title: ይዘት በውሂብ የተደገፈ ነው
am.summary: የስምሪት ካርድ፣ የተዘጋጁ የጎራ ሞተሮች፣ የበይነገጽ አገናኞች፣ የማረጋገጫ መስመሮችና የመንገድ ካርታ ደረጃዎች እንደ የተዋቀሩ መዝገቦች ተቀርጸዋል።

proofLanes.label: Evolution
proofLanes.title: Expansion without redesign
proofLanes.summary: New public surfaces and domains enter the public site only after their release boundary is verified.

am.label: ዝግመተ ለውጥ
am.title: ያለ ድጋሚ ንድፍ መስፋፋት
am.summary: አዲስ ሪፖዚቶሪዎችና ጎራዎች የመለቀቅ ወሰናቸው ከተረጋገጠ በኋላ ብቻ ወደ ይፋዊ ጣቢያ ይገባሉ።

interfaces.name: Docs
interfaces.summary: Reference material, architecture notes, and public learning paths.

am.name: ሰነዶች
am.summary: የማመሳከሪያ ቁሳቁስ፣ የአርክቴክቸር ማስታወሻዎችና ይፋዊ የመማሪያ መንገዶች።

interfaces.name: Sandbox
interfaces.summary: Experimental surface reserved for governed demonstrations and prototypes.

am.name: Sandbox
am.summary: ለሚተዳደሩ ማሳያዎችና ፕሮቶታይፖች ሙከራዊ ገጽ።

interfaces.name: API
interfaces.summary: Public gateway reserved for service contracts and machine-facing endpoints.

am.name: API
am.summary: ለአገልግሎት ውሎችና ለማሽን-ተኮር መዳረሻዎች የተያዘ ይፋዊ መግቢያ።

interfaces.name: Metrics
interfaces.summary: Evidence plane reserved for runtime metrics, audits, graphs, and release witnesses.

am.name: Metrics
am.summary: ለruntime መለኪያዎች፣ ኦዲቶች፣ ግራፎችና የመለቀቅ ምስክሮች የተያዘ የማስረጃ ሰሌዳ።

services.name: Mullusi Govern Cloud
services.summary: Hosted symbolic governance for constraint evaluation, causal verdicts, proof states, and append-only trace records.

am.name: ሙሉሲ Govern Cloud
am.summary: ለገደብ ግምገማ፣ ለምክንያታዊ ፍርዶች፣ ለማረጋገጫ ሁኔታዎችና ለተጨማሪ-ብቻ የዱካ መዝገቦች የተስተናገደ ምልክታዊ አስተዳደር።

services.name: Developer Packages
services.summary: Client SDK, CLI, and local validators that submit governed requests to Mullusi services without becoming the paid service itself.

am.name: የአበልጻጊ ጥቅሎች
am.summary: ወደ ሙሉሲ አገልግሎቶች የሚተዳደር ጥያቄ የሚያስገቡ የደንበኛ SDK፣ CLI እና አካባቢያዊ አረጋጋጮች — ራሳቸው የሚከፈልበት አገልግሎት ሳይሆኑ።

services.name: Mullusi Dashboard
services.summary: Project control, trace review, proof stamps, violations, usage, teams, and release witness visibility.

am.name: ሙሉሲ ዳሽቦርድ
am.summary: የፕሮጀክት ቁጥጥር፣ የዱካ ግምገማ፣ የማረጋገጫ ማህተሞች፣ ጥሰቶች፣ አጠቃቀም፣ ቡድኖችና የመለቀቅ ምስክር ታይነት።

services.name: Mullu Inspect Service
services.summary: Website, API, source-boundary, and workflow inspection that reports structural gaps, missing evidence, and unstable public claims.

am.name: የሙሉ ምርመራ አገልግሎት
am.summary: የድረ-ገጽ፣ የAPI፣ የሪፖዚቶሪና የworkflow ምርመራ — የመዋቅር ክፍተቶችን፣ የጎደለ ማስረጃንና ያልተረጋጉ ይፋዊ የይገባኛል ጥያቄዎችን ይዘግባል።

services.name: Mfidel Validation Service
services.summary: Atomic fidel validation for grid references, overlay metadata, and public text checks without shape or sound decomposition.

am.name: የMfidel ማረጋገጥ አገልግሎት
am.summary: ለgrid ማመሳከሪያዎች፣ ለoverlay ሜታዳታና ለይፋዊ ጽሑፍ ፍተሻዎች አቶማዊ የfidel ማረጋገጥ — ያለ ቅርጽ ወይም ድምፅ መበስበስ።

services.name: Enterprise Mullusi
services.summary: Private cloud or customer-controlled deployment with custom governance rules, audit export, and support boundaries.

am.name: የድርጅት ሙሉሲ
am.summary: ብጁ የአስተዳደር ደንቦች፣ የኦዲት ወጪና የድጋፍ ወሰኖች ያሉት የግል ደመና ወይም በደንበኛ የሚቆጣጠር ስምሪት።

serviceTiers.name: Free
serviceTiers.summary: Demonstrate the verdict-trace loop: explore the SDK, CLI, sandbox examples, public docs, and small-volume hosted evaluations.

am.name: ነጻ
am.summary: የፍርድ-ዱካ ዙረትን ያሳዩ፦ SDK፣ CLI፣ የsandbox ምሳሌዎች፣ ይፋዊ ሰነዶችና አነስተኛ-መጠን የተስተናገዱ ግምገማዎችን ያስሱ።

serviceTiers.name: Pro
serviceTiers.summary: Operationalize governance into developer workflows: higher hosted evaluation limits, persistent traces, project history, proof stamp access, and dashboard workspace control.

am.name: Pro
am.summary: አስተዳደርን ወደ የአበልጻጊ የሥራ ፍሰት ያስገቡ፦ ከፍተኛ የተስተናገደ ግምገማ ገደቦች፣ ቋሚ ዱካዎች፣ የፕሮጀክት ታሪክ፣ የማረጋገጫ ማህተም መዳረሻና የዳሽቦርድ ቦታ ቁጥጥር።

serviceTiers.name: Team
serviceTiers.summary: Shared projects, team trace review, role boundaries, audit export, environment separation, and release witness records.

am.name: ቡድን
am.summary: የተጋሩ ፕሮጀክቶች፣ የቡድን ዱካ ግምገማ፣ የሚና ወሰኖች፣ የኦዲት ወጪ፣ የአካባቢ መለያየትና የመለቀቅ ምስክር መዝገቦች።

serviceTiers.name: Enterprise
serviceTiers.summary: Govern high-consequence actions with full audit lineage: private cloud or customer-controlled deployment, custom governance rules, support boundary, and compliance evidence exports.

am.name: ድርጅት
am.summary: ከፍተኛ-መዘዝ ያላቸውን ድርጊቶች በሙሉ የኦዲት ሐረግ ያስተዳድሩ፦ የግል ደመና ወይም በደንበኛ የሚቆጣጠር ስምሪት፣ ብጁ የአስተዳደር ደንቦች፣ የድጋፍ ወሰንና የተገዢነት ማስረጃ ወጪዎች።

serviceTiers.name: Certification
serviceTiers.summary: Paid proof review, structural inspection, violation report, repair plan, and Mullusi proof-of-resolution stamp.

am.name: ማረጋገጫ
am.summary: የሚከፈል የማረጋገጫ ግምገማ፣ የመዋቅር ምርመራ፣ የጥሰት ሪፖርት፣ የጥገና እቅድና የሙሉሲ የመፍትሄ-ማረጋገጫ ማህተም።

serviceTiers.name: Governed Pilot
serviceTiers.summary: Apply Mullusi to one high-risk workflow with declared evidence boundaries, a governed verdict-trace loop, and a defined rollback path.

am.name: የሚተዳደር ሙከራ
am.summary: ሙሉሲን በአንድ ከፍተኛ-ስጋት የሥራ ፍሰት ላይ ከተገለጹ የማስረጃ ወሰኖች፣ ከሚተዳደር የፍርድ-ዱካ ዙረትና ከተወሰነ የመመለሻ መንገድ ጋር ይተግብሩ።

apiContracts.name: Govern Evaluation
apiContracts.output: verdict, proof state, violations, trace reference, repair actions, storage state, proof stamp eligibility
apiContracts.summary: Evaluates a proposed action or system state against Mullusi governance constraints and records a causal trace.

am.name: Govern ግምገማ
am.output: ፍርድ፣ የማረጋገጫ ሁኔታ፣ ጥሰቶች፣ የዱካ ማመሳከሪያ፣ የጥገና ድርጊቶች፣ የማከማቻ ሁኔታ፣ የማረጋገጫ ማህተም ብቁነት
am.summary: የቀረበ ድርጊትን ወይም የሥርዓት ሁኔታን ከሙሉሲ የአስተዳደር ገደቦች ጋር ይገመግማል፤ ምክንያታዊ ዱካም ይመዘግባል።

apiContracts.name: Trace Retrieval
apiContracts.input: evaluation reference and authorized project context
apiContracts.output: ordered phase deltas, blocked phase, judgments, and append-only lineage records
apiContracts.summary: Returns the evidence path behind a verdict so users can inspect cause, constraint, and repair state.

am.name: የዱካ ማውጣት
am.output: የተደረደሩ የደረጃ ለውጦች፣ የተዘጋ ደረጃ፣ ፍርዶችና ተጨማሪ-ብቻ የሐረግ መዝገቦች
am.summary: ከፍርድ ጀርባ ያለውን የማስረጃ መንገድ ይመልሳል — ተጠቃሚዎች ምክንያትን፣ ገደብንና የጥገና ሁኔታን እንዲመረምሩ።

apiContracts.name: Proof Stamp Verification
apiContracts.output: stamp hash, signature state, verification state, evaluation reference, and persisted stamp envelope
apiContracts.summary: Verifies that a proof stamp belongs to a recorded evaluation and has not drifted from its stored lineage.

am.name: የማረጋገጫ ማህተም ማረጋገጥ
am.output: የማህተም ሃሽ፣ የፊርማ ሁኔታ፣ የማረጋገጥ ሁኔታ፣ የግምገማ ማመሳከሪያ፣ የተቀመጠ የማህተም ኤንቨሎፕ
am.summary: የማረጋገጫ ማህተም የተመዘገበ ግምገማ መሆኑንና ከተቀመጠው ሐረግ አለመንሸራተቱን ያረጋግጣል።

apiContracts.name: Proof Stamp Revocation
apiContracts.input: proof stamp reference, reason, authority, trace reference, API key, and operator key
apiContracts.output: revocation id, stamp id, revocation state, trace reference, and storage state
apiContracts.summary: Appends a private operator revocation record without deleting the original proof stamp lineage.

apiContracts.name: Proof Stamp Revocation Readback
apiContracts.input: proof stamp reference, API key, and operator key
apiContracts.output: stamp id, revocation state, reason, trace reference, and revoked timestamp
apiContracts.summary: Returns private operator readback for the active proof-stamp revocation record without exposing the write path publicly.

apiContracts.name: Mfidel Validation
apiContracts.input: atomic fidel references, grid coordinates, overlay metadata, and validation mode
apiContracts.output: pass or violation state with atomicity-preserving diagnostics
apiContracts.summary: Validates Mfidel records while preserving each fidel as an atomic symbol and rejecting decomposition paths.

am.name: Mfidel ማረጋገጥ
am.input: አቶማዊ የfidel ማመሳከሪያዎች፣ የgrid መጋጠሚያዎች፣ overlay ሜታዳታና የማረጋገጥ ሁነታ
am.output: የማለፍ ወይም የጥሰት ሁኔታ ከአቶማዊነት-ጠባቂ ምርመራ ጋር
am.summary: የMfidel መዝገቦችን እያንዳንዱን fidel እንደ አቶማዊ ምልክት እየጠበቀ ያረጋግጣል፤ የመበስበስ መንገዶችን ይከለክላል።

repositoryHandoff.label: Lineage handoff
repositoryHandoff.title: Registry state feeds release state.
repositoryHandoff.summary: A private incubation project becomes a public surface only when its proof surface, docs route, and demo boundary are attached.

am.label: የሐረግ ማስተላለፍ
am.title: የመዝገብ ሁኔታ የመለቀቅ ሁኔታን ይመግባል።
am.summary: የግል ማብሰያ ፕሮጀክት ይፋዊ ሪፖዚቶሪ የሚሆነው የማረጋገጫ ገጹ፣ የሰነድ መንገዱና የማሳያ ወሰኑ ሲያያዙ ብቻ ነው።

releaseStages.title: Register
releaseStages.summary: Add or revise a deployed public-surface record in the structured registry.

am.title: መዝግብ
am.summary: በተዋቀረው መዝገብ ውስጥ የተሰማራ ይፋዊ-ገጽ መዝገብ ይጨምሩ ወይም ያሻሽሉ።

releaseStages.title: Attach
releaseStages.summary: Connect docs, demo, proof, status, and contact routes.

am.title: አያይዝ
am.summary: ሪፖዚቶሪ፣ ሰነድ፣ ማሳያ፣ ማረጋገጫ፣ ሁኔታና የመገናኛ መንገዶችን ያገናኙ።

releaseStages.title: Verify
releaseStages.summary: Confirm claims, accessibility, local rendering, and public boundary constraints.

am.title: አረጋግጥ
am.summary: የይገባኛል ጥያቄዎችን፣ ተደራሽነትን፣ አካባቢያዊ ማሳየትንና የይፋዊ ወሰን ገደቦችን ያረጋግጡ።

releaseStages.title: Publish
releaseStages.summary: Expose the product surface only after the public boundary is verified.

am.title: አትም
am.summary: የምርቱን ገጽ የይፋዊ ወሰኑ ከተረጋገጠ በኋላ ብቻ ያጋልጡ።

evaluationExample.label: Worked Example
evaluationExample.title: What a governed evaluation looks like.
evaluationExample.disclaimer: Illustrative only. Not a live endpoint. Runtime stays AwaitingEvidence until witness endpoints publish signed evidence.
evaluationExample.request: { project, action: "deploy gateway", symbols: [Σ, Λ], constraints: [budget, policy, causality], context }
evaluationExample.summary: An ordinary pipeline would run the action and report failure afterward. A governed evaluation refuses the unsafe transition before execution and emits a verifiable record of why.

steps.v: BLOCK — an unsafe transition was detected before any effect ran.
Causality constraint Λ unsatisfied: an effect was declared without lineage.
Append-only record of every phase, constraint, and judgment that produced the verdict.
Attach the missing lineage record, then re-evaluate the same action.
Pending — issued only when the evaluation closes against signed runtime evidence.

am.label: የተሰራ ምሳሌ
am.title: የሚተዳደር ግምገማ ምን እንደሚመስል።
am.disclaimer: ለማሳያ ብቻ። ቀጥታ መዳረሻ አይደለም። የምስክር መዳረሻዎች የተፈረመ ማስረጃ እስኪያትሙ ድረስ runtime AwaitingEvidence ሆኖ ይቆያል።
am.summary: ተራ pipeline ድርጊቱን አሂዶ ከዚያ ውድቀቱን ይዘግባል። የሚተዳደር ግምገማ ግን ደህንነቱ ያልተጠበቀ ሽግግርን ከመፈጸሙ በፊት ይከለክላል፤ ለምን እንደሆነ ሊረጋገጥ የሚችል መዝገብም ያወጣል።

steps.v: BLOCK — ማንኛውም ውጤት ከመፈጸሙ በፊት ደህንነቱ ያልተጠበቀ ሽግግር ተገኝቷል።
የምክንያታዊነት ገደብ Λ አልተሟላም፦ ውጤት ያለ ሐረግ ተገልጿል።
ፍርዱን ያስገኘውን እያንዳንዱን ደረጃ፣ ገደብና ፍርድ የያዘ ተጨማሪ-ብቻ መዝገብ።
የጎደለውን የሐረግ መዝገብ ያያይዙ፣ ከዚያ ተመሳሳዩን ድርጊት እንደገና ይገምግሙ።
በመጠባበቅ ላይ — ግምገማው በተፈረመ runtime ማስረጃ ላይ ሲዘጋ ብቻ ይሰጣል።

statusBoard.label: System status
statusBoard.title: What is live, what is not.
statusBoard.follow: Endpoints are not yet live. Request access through the governed pilot route or watch the proof boundary for signed release evidence.

rows.note: Public site serving mullusi.com from controlled private source.
Endpoints publish only after signed witness evidence closes.
Issued once runtime conformance is reachable and verified.
API, dashboard, sandbox, metrics, and learn remain reserved until their DNS and witness pages are provisioned.

witnessChecks.purpose: Gateway witness closure and edge-to-runtime binding.
Runtime contract conformance before production claims.

closureGates.evidence: Reachable health response with status=ok and service name; /v1/version publishes API and evaluator identifiers.
closureGates.failureAction: Keep Govern API and proof stamp state AwaitingEvidence.

closureGates.evidence: Reachable response with edge host, policy version, registry version, and witness id.
closureGates.failureAction: Keep API surface reserved and route users to the proof boundary.

closureGates.evidence: Reachable response with contract hash, endpoint checks, and proof stamp eligibility.
closureGates.failureAction: Block proof stamp issuance until conformance evidence closes.

healthWitness.label: Health and version witness
healthWitness.title: Health is the first public runtime liveness check.
healthWitness.summary: The health alias and versioned health route return the same deterministic service envelope. The version route publishes only public API and evaluator identifiers.

responseExamples.title: Health response
responseExamples.purpose: Public liveness witness for the Govern Cloud service.

responseExamples.title: Version response
responseExamples.purpose: Public version witness for the API and evaluator contract.

runtimeConformance.label: Runtime conformance contract
runtimeConformance.title: Conformance is the public release gate witness.
runtimeConformance.summary: The conformance route returns runtime_state, release_gate, and redacted findings. It never exposes secret values and keeps runtime claims AwaitingEvidence until every finding passes.

findingContract.name: required_environment
findingContract.blocks: Missing required runtime keys block release.

findingContract.name: image
findingContract.blocks: latest or unpinned images block release.

findingContract.name: MULLUSI_DEV_API_KEY
findingContract.blocks: Missing, placeholder, or short caller key blocks release.

findingContract.name: MULLUSI_OPERATOR_API_KEY
findingContract.blocks: Missing, placeholder, or short operator key blocks private revocation.

findingContract.name: MULLUSI_PROOF_SIGNING_KEY
findingContract.blocks: Missing, placeholder, or short signing key blocks proof stamp verification.

findingContract.name: database_url
findingContract.blocks: Local or malformed database URLs block durable lineage.

findingContract.name: persistence_policy
findingContract.blocks: Production must fail closed when persistence is unavailable.

findingContract.name: allowed_origins
findingContract.blocks: Non-HTTPS or non-Mullusi origins block public release.

findingContract.name: database_schema
findingContract.blocks: Missing schema blocks trace, proof stamp, and revocation persistence.

responseExamples.title: Blocked conformance response
responseExamples.purpose: Returned when production inputs or persistence witnesses are incomplete.

responseExamples.title: Ready conformance response
responseExamples.purpose: Returned only when every release preflight and persistence finding passes.

gatewayWitness.label: Gateway witness protected paths
gatewayWitness.summary: The gateway witness binds public service metadata to protected API paths without exposing secrets.

responseExamples.title: Blocked gateway witness
responseExamples.purpose: Returned when release inputs are incomplete but the gateway witness route remains reachable.

responseExamples.title: Ready gateway witness
responseExamples.purpose: Returned when gateway metadata and runtime conformance close for release.

am.label: የሥርዓት ሁኔታ
am.title: ምን ቀጥታ ነው፣ ምን አይደለም።
am.follow: Request access or watch the proof boundary for signed release evidence.

rows.note: ከmain ቅርንጫፍ mullusi.com የሚያቀርብ ይፋዊ ጣቢያ።
መዳረሻዎች የሚታተሙት የተፈረመ የምስክር ማስረጃ ከተዘጋ በኋላ ብቻ ነው።

proofStampArtifact.label: Proof Stamp Artifact
proofStampArtifact.title: A proof stamp is an evidence envelope, not a marketing badge.
proofStampArtifact.summary: A stamp can be issued only when runtime witness checks close, the evaluated action has an immutable trace, and the stored envelope can be verified against the public proof boundary.

fields.name: stamp_id
fields.purpose: Stable public reference for the stamp envelope.

fields.name: evaluation_id
fields.purpose: Traceable link to the governed evaluation that produced the verdict.

fields.name: subject
fields.purpose: Product, action, route, or artifact the stamp is allowed to describe.

fields.name: verdict
fields.purpose: Closed judgment such as pass, block, or awaiting evidence.

fields.name: proof_state
fields.purpose: Verification state bound to the evidence set.

fields.name: policy_version
fields.purpose: Governance policy version used during evaluation.

fields.name: registry_version
fields.purpose: Product registry version used for product and route context.

fields.name: witness_set
fields.purpose: Runtime witness endpoint results and closure evidence.

fields.name: trace_ref
fields.purpose: Authorized reference to the append-only causal trace.

fields.name: issued_at
fields.purpose: Observed issuance time after witness closure.

fields.name: content_hash
fields.purpose: Hash of the canonical stamp envelope.

fields.name: signature
fields.purpose: Signature over the canonical envelope and content hash.

issueRequirements: Runtime witness checks close for /health, /gateway/witness, and /runtime/conformance.
Evaluation trace is stored in append-only lineage.
Policy version and product registry version are recorded.
Canonical envelope hash is computed before signature.
Public verifier can resolve the stamp without exposing private source or customer data.

lifecycle.meaning: Evaluation has the data needed to request a stamp, but no signed public envelope exists yet.
Envelope hash and signature are committed after witness closure.
Verifier confirms signature, hash, trace reference, policy version, and witness set.
A later governance event invalidates the public claim while preserving the original lineage.

proofStampVerifier.label: Verifier Route
proofStampVerifier.title: Verification is a fail-closed read path.
proofStampVerifier.summary: The verifier route reads a proof stamp envelope, recomputes its canonical hash, checks signature state, confirms trace and witness linkage, and returns a bounded verification result without exposing private source or customer data.
proofStampVerifier.output: verification_state, stamp_id, envelope_version, content_hash, signature_state, evaluation_id, witness_state, revocation_state, checked_at

checks.name: Envelope exists
checks.purpose: Reject unknown or unpublished stamp references.

checks.name: Canonical hash matches
checks.purpose: Detect drift between stored envelope and returned envelope.

checks.name: Signature verifies
checks.purpose: Confirm that the envelope was signed after canonicalization.

checks.name: Evaluation trace resolves
checks.purpose: Confirm the stamp points to a retained append-only trace.

checks.name: Witness set closes
checks.purpose: Confirm /health, /gateway/witness, and /runtime/conformance are represented in the stamp.

checks.name: Revocation state checked
checks.purpose: Preserve lineage while blocking stale public claims.

outcomes.meaning: All hash, signature, trace, witness, and revocation checks pass.
The stamp or trace exists but runtime witness closure is incomplete.
The envelope, hash, signature, or trace linkage fails verification.
The original stamp remains in lineage, but the public claim is no longer valid.
No public stamp envelope exists for the requested reference.

decisionLadder.condition: No persisted proof stamp resolves for stamp_id.
decisionLadder.evidence: stamp_id lookup returns no public envelope.

decisionLadder.condition: Envelope exists but signature or signing key is missing.
decisionLadder.action: Block Verified and keep the stamp in evidence collection.

decisionLadder.condition: Hash, signature, algorithm, or trace linkage fails.
decisionLadder.evidence: Verifier recomputation conflicts with persisted envelope metadata.
decisionLadder.action: Return Invalid and preserve the failed check trace.

decisionLadder.condition: Trace readback or runtime witness closure is incomplete.
decisionLadder.evidence: Trace route, witness set, or runtime conformance does not close.
decisionLadder.action: Block public proof claims until missing evidence closes.

decisionLadder.evidence: Revocation ledger readback returns active revoked state.
decisionLadder.action: Keep original lineage and block the stale public claim.

decisionLadder.condition: Hash, signature, trace, witness, and revocation checks all close.
decisionLadder.evidence: Verifier returns verification_state=Verified with retained content hash.
decisionLadder.action: Return Verified without exposing private source or customer data.

stateModel.evidence: No persisted proof stamp record resolves for the requested stamp_id.
A record exists but no signature has been issued.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return not-issued signature_state and block Verified.

stateModel.evidence: A signed record cannot be checked because the runtime signing key is unavailable.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return key-unavailable signature_state and block Verified.

stateModel.evidence: The recomputed signature matches the persisted envelope hash and evaluation reference.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return Verified only after hash, signature, witness, and revocation checks close.

stateModel.evidence: The recomputed signature does not match the persisted signature.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return Invalid and preserve the failed verification trace.

stateModel.evidence: The persisted signature algorithm is outside the governed verifier contract.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return Invalid without attempting fallback interpretation.

stateModel.evidence: A later governance event invalidates the public claim while preserving lineage.
stateModel.responseBoundary: Return Revoked when an active revocation ledger row exists.

sampleResponse.note: Static example response. It does not claim live runtime availability.

responseExamples.title: Verified response
responseExamples.purpose: Public verifier closure after hash, signature, trace, witness, and revocation checks pass.

responseExamples.title: Awaiting evidence response
responseExamples.purpose: Public verifier response when the stamp exists but the signature or witness evidence has not closed.

responseExamples.title: Invalid response
responseExamples.purpose: Public verifier response when signature, hash, algorithm, or trace linkage fails.

responseExamples.title: Revoked response
responseExamples.purpose: Public verifier response when a later governance event invalidates a previously issued claim.

responseExamples.title: Not found response
responseExamples.purpose: Public verifier response when no persisted proof stamp resolves for the requested stamp_id.

responseExamples.title: Persistence unavailable response
responseExamples.purpose: Fail-closed transport response when durable proof stamp storage cannot be queried.

operatorBoundary.label: Private revocation operator boundary
operatorBoundary.title: Revocation is private, append-only, and operator-authenticated.
operatorBoundary.summary: Public verifier state can become Revoked only through operator-authenticated routes that preserve the original proof stamp lineage. The website never exposes revocation as a public action.

failureModes.meaning: Operator header is missing, so mutation is blocked.
Reason, authority, and trace reference must remain single-line lineage atoms.
Storage is unavailable, so no revocation write is accepted.
Operator header is missing, so private readback is blocked.
Storage is unavailable, so revocation state cannot be proven.

implementation.label: Local implementation evidence
implementation.runtimeBoundary: The verifier has a local FastAPI route and tests. Public api.mullusi.com remains AwaitingEvidence until deployed runtime witness endpoints close.

files.role: HTTP verifier route, private revocation write/readback routes, response models, persistence lookup, and fail-closed error mapping.
Read-only evaluation trace retrieval route required by proof-stamp trace resolution.
API key boundary and private operator key boundary for proof-state mutation.
Proof stamp hash basis, signature verification, public outcome mapping, and witness boundary fields.
Persistent proof stamp and append-only revocation ledger schema.
Proof stamp lookup with active revocation readback from persistence.
Private operator command that appends revocation and verifies readback.
Read-only operator command for inspecting current revocation state without mutation.
End-to-end trace probe that writes an evaluation and verifies ordered persisted trace readback.
Route-level proof that persisted records return the public verifier contract.
Unit proof for valid, invalid, unsigned, missing-key, unsupported-algorithm, and revoked verification states.
Schema proof that revocation storage exists before runtime readiness can pass.
Command proof for required keys, write/readback sequence, and mismatch blocking.
Readback command proof for required keys, revoked state, not-revoked state, and malformed lineage blocking.
Trace probe proof for storage witness, phase matching, and ordered phase-index validation.

deploymentGates: Configure MULLUSI_PROOF_SIGNING_KEY in the runtime secret boundary.
Configure MULLUSI_OPERATOR_API_KEY before enabling private revocation writes.
Enable persistent proof stamp records before public verification.
Confirm GET /v1/evaluations/{evaluation_id}/trace resolves ordered append-only trace deltas.
Run python scripts/probe_trace.py after persistence and schema are ready; require trace_probe_passed.
Apply the revocation ledger migration before issuing public proof stamps.
Run python scripts/read_proof_stamp_revocation.py before and after any revocation action.
Run python scripts/revoke_proof_stamp.py only from an operator-controlled environment.

releaseWitnesses.name: Deployment environment
releaseWitnesses.boundary: Production values are present without local placeholders.

releaseWitnesses.name: Release preflight
releaseWitnesses.boundary: Runtime settings, signing key, persistence, and schema are ready.

releaseWitnesses.name: Persistence probe
releaseWitnesses.boundary: Evaluation write, proof stamp issue, and public verifier readback close.

releaseWitnesses.name: Trace probe
releaseWitnesses.boundary: Evaluation trace readback matches stored phase order and trace identity.

releaseWitnesses.name: Revocation readback
releaseWitnesses.boundary: Operator-only revocation state is observable without exposing private source.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.title: Where a governed evaluation earns its keep.

items.title: Audit trail for an autonomous agent
items.body: Record every decision, constraint check, and tool call as an immutable, append-only trace you can replay later.

items.title: Compliance gate for a financial workflow
items.body: Prove a transaction satisfied every internal policy before it executes — not after it fails.

items.title: Reproducibility proof for a research result
items.body: Capture the exact symbols, constraints, and lineage so a result can be re-verified independently.

items.title: ለራስ-ገዝ ወኪል የኦዲት ዱካ
items.body: እያንዳንዱን ውሳኔ፣ የገደብ ፍተሻና የመሣሪያ ጥሪ ወደፊት ሊደገም የሚችል የማይለወጥ ተጨማሪ-ብቻ ዱካ አድርጎ ይመዝግቡ።

items.title: ለፋይናንስ workflow የተገዢነት በር
items.body: ግብይት ከመፈጸሙ በፊት እያንዳንዱን ውስጣዊ ፖሊሲ ማሟላቱን ያረጋግጡ — ከከሸፈ በኋላ ሳይሆን።

items.title: ለምርምር ውጤት የድግግሞሽ ማረጋገጫ
items.body: ውጤቱ ራሱን ችሎ እንደገና እንዲረጋገጥ ትክክለኛዎቹን ምልክቶች፣ ገደቦችና ሐረግ ይያዙ።

mulluActivity.label: Mullu Activity
mulluActivity.title: Mullu related news and activity
mulluActivity.summary: Internal activity records for the Mullu product path, platform spine, proof boundary, and release gates.

items.title: Platform map promoted to the public site
items.body: mullusi.com now presents Mullusi as company, governed platform, and product ecosystem instead of one isolated website.

items.title: Mullusi Product Registry added
items.body: The registry now tracks product classification, source boundary, runtime type, data type, API path, docs path, release gate, and failure mode.

items.title: Control plane spine clarified
items.body: The public map now separates public surfaces, user surfaces, API surface, control plane, product services, storage, runtime infrastructure, and development layer.

items.title: Proof boundary remains explicit
items.body: Govern API and proof stamp claims stay AwaitingEvidence until signed runtime witness endpoints are reachable and verified.

items.title: Mobile menu and public surface navigation refined
items.body: The menu is viewport-bounded, scrollable, and labeled around surfaces so public navigation matches the platform map.
